hotel_name: Saigon River Hotel - Quận 2 (SAIGON River Hotel - Dist 2)

reviews.title: Bad Bad Bad
reviews.text: This is NOT a hotel there is NO hotel at this address. The phone number is NOT in operation. The Agoda staff and their AI are very BAD to handle this kind of situation and this is very common in Vietnam!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: Room without balcony made me a bit uncomfortable

reviews.title: Avoid.
reviews.text:
The hotel doesn't exist...

Get a grip on your listings, Agoda....

reviews.title: Hôtel confortable
reviews.negatives: Rien

reviews.title: Not worth it.

reviews.title: Einfach zweckmäßig ohne Komfort oder Luxus
reviews.positives:
Die Lage war für unser Anliegen ideal.
Für 100 vnd /Tag konnte man ein Moped mieten 
Man konnte ungestört von der Unterkunft operieren 
Das Zimmer war groß und hatte einen Balkon
reviews.negatives:
Die Austattung war sehr einfach und nur zweckmäßig 
Reinigung der Zimmer nur nach expliziten Wunsch 
Kein Safe / kein Toilettenpapier vorhanden / Trinkwasser Tee Kaffee Wasserkocher fehlte auf dem Zimmer

reviews.title: General
reviews.text: The hotel room doesn't reflect what it shows on line. I spent 2days/3nights at the hotel, they cleaned the room and changed the bed sheets once. When asked, they said I needed to request them. Garbage stays in the room the whole time.The phone was broken. When reported, they ignored and later said they won't fix it. The TV has no pictures. Reported, and ignored completely. Nothing in the room, in the fridge, not even a glass to drink water/basic things except for some toothbrushes/pastes as well as little bags of shampoos which are the cheapest kind there is. Little lizards were roaming around. When I reported , the receptionist said it was not his problem. There is only one receptionist for different shift. All the receptionists are male, and they are rude. No greetings, no instructions unless I asked. When I asked for something, they got very defensive saying they just work here. They do what the owner told them to do. Their job is to sit at the front desk. Respect: zero. Friendliness: zero. Helpfulness: zero. Professionalism: zero. Customer service knowledge/training: zero. It is not a hotel. Definitely not a 2 star hotel. It is more like a motel for hourly/one night stand couples. I got fooled by the price. Agoda need to verify before posted these kinds of "hotels" on the website.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 清潔感があって、ホコリっぽくない。
reviews.negatives: アリがいた事。連日の滞在だったので室内に荷物がある状態だったけど、フロントの女性が鍵を渡すように要求された。

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Wouldn't recommend to stay unless, you are desperate for a place. Bed sheets seems like reused as still have hairs on the bed.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
호텔 체크아웃 후 유럼선 선착장과 가까워서 좋았음 
청소 상태가 깨긋했음
reviews.negatives:
처음 603호 방키를.받고 물을 열려고 하는데 안에 사람이.있었음
다시 립세션 가서 방을 바꿨음
더 안좋은 방으로 줌 ㅠㅠ

reviews.title: Do not trust
reviews.text: First the lady took a picture of my passport with her cellphone which i thought was odd. When i left she asked me to pay her again even though she checked me in the day before and knew id already paid. Based on 9ther reviews i was prepared for this. It was obvious that she was trying to take advantage of a foreigner. I would not recommend the hotel.

reviews.title: Không hài lòng
reviews.negatives: Mình chuyển tiền xuất hoá đơn bị nhầm, thừa hơn 600.000đ. Đã báo hơn 10 ngày trước nhưng giờ hỏi khi nào back lại tiền bằng tin nhắn qua Zalo suốt mấy hôm nay không trả lời, mặc dù đã nhận đọc tin nhắn của khách.

reviews.title: To be avoided...
reviews.text:
I spent the last 7 days in this motel near my new work location.
I was spending most of my time at office but I was clearly unhappy to go back to hotel every evening...
The staff (especially the reception desk lady) is very unwelcoming and nobody can speak English.
You have to be ready to take most of your showers with cold water.
Also, don't expect your room to be cleaned, even in one week, they did it once because I insisted a lot.
The place is very noisy and you'll be able to hear the "night ladies" living in the hotel like if they are in your own room.
Last part, they tried to rip my money off at the check-out... I had fully paid the 7-days stay at Agoda booking and they asked me to pay it again, pretending they cannot find my payment confirmation.
Well, never again!

reviews.negatives: Tiện nghi thiếu thốn, không ấm đun, không có smart tivi, không máy sấy tóc. Chưa đến giờ mà nhân viên hối trả phòng. Nước yếu.

reviews.title: Arrogant and Irresponsible Hotel, stay away!
reviews.text:
I booked the hotel and was about ti areive adter midnught. 
I sent an email ti the hotel, noone respinded. I called the hitel and the confirmed the reservation amd tild me my room is reserved and i can come anch checknin any time sfter midnight, my rio. is 305 and the key is at reception.
When ai srrived in the dark night noone opened first, then they let me wait about 45kinutes ti tell me they have no room for me.
TERRIBLE, do not make reservation at such fraudsters whicb let you stay in the road in the middle of the night after confirming everything

reviews.title: I guess you get what you pay for
reviews.text: Incredibly loud in the rooms. Everything echos... Everything. No toilet paper in room. Some of the soap packets they provided were used. It's an inexpensive option, but I still expected the basic necessities.

reviews.title: SAIGON RIVER HOTEL
reviews.text: the place is good, good for its price. comfortable stay. however, the receptionists are not accomodating, specifically the one with tattooed arm. he is a bit rude. he didn’t accomodate us properly and as a foreigner, he should be more hospitable to the guests. but overall, the place is good, perfect for a short stay and good price too.
reviews.response: Excuse me, sir/madam. I am the receptionist. What was I not being considerate about? You arrived early with a lot of luggage. I asked if you wanted to check in early, and I offered an extra charge. If you didn't agree, I simply moved your luggage to the other side to keep it tidy at the reception desk so we could attend to other guests. Why are you so upset? We don't discriminate based on nationality; everyone here is a guest. Perhaps you're being a bit picky. I apologize and hope you have a pleasant trip.

reviews.title: a hostel is better
reviews.text: No hot water. TV did not work. Once after coming in at 2am. I had to ring the bell for 30 minutes to be let in.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Nhà nghỉ theo giờ

reviews.title: How to be ripped off .
reviews.text: I was staying at the Sai Gon River Hotel last week on booking ID 305435424, my reservation ended and I decided to stay for 3 more nights . I booked on Agoda with booking ID 306620648 but was denied my choice to pay by card . I had to pay the hotel by cash. Fortunately I got a receipt for 1,056,000vnd. Later the Sai Gon River Hotel claimed a 'No show'. Subsequently AGODA made an autocratic decision to debit my card number which one has to supply just in case one hurls the TV into the swimming pool . Now either the Sai Gon River hotel is in total chaos over the weekend while they rent out their many 'short term rental rooms' to young lovebirds (or ugly guys with call girls on their arm) or they didn't like my review on the subject and the total lack of hot water because of the volume of traffic through the doors on a rainy weekend.  AGODA in the meantime is impossible to contact too .

Drap giường, gối mền cũ, trên giường vẫn còn tóc và lông, có vẻ như chưa thay drap mới. Cửa phòng không nhảy chốt, mỗi lần đóng cửa khá khó khăn. Tổng quan phòng khá cũ cần đc nâng cấp.

reviews.negatives: Приехал в день заселения в 22:00 номер был к этому времени почему-то не готов. Попросили подождать 20 минут. Для того что бы сделать уборку. После того как я вошел в номер понял что уборка была сделана на скорую руку. По всюду были женские волосы и даже в «чисто постеле» это вызвало большое отвращение

reviews.title: A bit pricy
reviews.text: Overall, it's an acceptable experience. The place was somewhat clean, with the exception of the toilet brush being seated on the toilet water tank (disgusting!). The shower was not the best, having only heated water and no cool water. Staffs were friendly overall. Some amenities like hairdryer and toilet paper are on-demand (free of charge) and unavailable by default. Position is fairly good, which was near Tran Nao Str. with a wide range of stores and restaurants to visit.

reviews.title: the facility is old, the atmosphere not good.
reviews.negatives: The room is smaller than we thought. the door is broken, cannot close nicely. During midnight, there is abnormal sounds from the bathroom faucet, keep happening until morning.

reviews.title: Cleaned Big Room
reviews.text: I have booked family room for myself and my family. The rooms was ok, cleaned and tidied. A local preferred room for short stay. I think location wise is not so convenient if you are a traveler who prefers night light at the district one.

reviews.title: Cheap cheap cheap ok for 1 night.  Because it’s cheap
reviews.negatives: Very noisy throughout the night.  Water system was also making sounds ..

reviews.title: Price is cheap but facility is not good enough
reviews.text: Hotel doesnt have the heater for hot water in the bathroom.

reviews.title: Acceptable quality and price. It could be better.
reviews.positives:
It is a good location if your intention is to be by the river. In this area there are a lot of hotels, and to a large extent, all the hotels are similar. 
The room is small but perfect for an overnight stay. The bathroom has hot water and in general the cleanliness was good.
reviews.negatives:
What I didn't like about the hotel, has to do with the cleanliness or maintenance of the hotel. Although my room was clean, it had details that took me out of the experience.
First: there are ants in the room. A lot of my clothes had ants on them and I didn't eat food in the hotel. There were also ants in the bathroom. This can be solved as easy as sealing with silicone or wall paste the small holes where the ants pass through. It is worth mentioning that I was on the 6th floor, high altitude. Which makes me think that the rooms closer to floor 1 have even more ants.
Second: on top of the closet there was a box of condoms. I assume from a previous guest, but it is also a criticism of the cleanliness of the hotel and rooms between each guest. It makes me think that the hotel staff may only change sheets and towels, rather than completely check the room.

reviews.title: Realised it's a hotel in the red-light district
reviews.text:
Only got to know when I arrived that it's a hotel among many others in the red-light district. Bed sheets are a little dirty. 

If you don't mind the above, then go for it.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The location is quite easy to find, and the staff are enthusiastic and charming. The downside is the spring mattress, which makes it hard to sleep, and the pillow is also uncomfortable, causing neck pain when I wake up. The cleanliness is acceptable, but there are still many stains on the surface of the mattress.

reviews.title: Basic and adequate
reviews.text: I had some issues with the wifi, and the plumbing.  The staff were very helpful, but I didn't enjoy moving rooms twice.   The place was pretty clean but definitely no frills    it could be worse, but it could be better.

The location is quite convenient for getting around, close to Thao Dien metro station which is within walking distance.

reviews.title: Voltage stabilizer
reviews.text:
The downside is that the toilet paper is quite cheap (I think buying a slightly better quality would be okay, right? Why use that kind of paper, sigh), and the air conditioner is a bit loud.

On the plus side, the room has a balcony, and it’s bright and pretty.

reviews.title: Good for the price
reviews.text: At a relatively good price it is a comfortable room to pass the night, in a quiet neighborhood. Good if you want to have a walk or spend some time at the more peaceful parts of the city. One minus is you can hear some noise from the rooms next to you

reviews.text: For $12 USD this place is pretty good. It’s not the Ritz or anything, and it’s pretty basic, but I found the cleanliness and facilities at least a bit better than some other nearby hotels. Location is far from glamorous but it’s an easy walk or motorbike ride into Thao Dien.

reviews.title: Would recommend
reviews.text:
Good location with many shops near by. Be aware that if you want to cross the street , it can be a challenge as the hotel is close to a busy highway. Staff is friendly with limited English but friendly with a big smile, but when in Vietnam, google translate is your best friend.  I travel around Vietnam but when I’m
Back to Saigon,  This is my number one choice due to the affordability and clean rooms. The hotel is quiet and far enough from the highway.

reviews.text: The hotel is well managed. It is clean & tidy with reasonable price. I highly recommend if you are going around district two with an economical price.

reviews.title: The hotel was nice
reviews.text: The hotel and the room were ok, but unluckily the couple in the next room was fighting until 12am. The hotel staff couldnt help to stop them.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Good location, good deals

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: It's very easy to go to D1 and the other place. Also all staff are kind.

reviews.title: Great deal
reviews.text: Very good deal for the price

reviews.title: Nice place!
reviews.text: We really liked it here! The location is nice, quiet, with motorcycle is only 5 minutes away from a lot of coffees and restaurants, walking is more like 15/20 min. The room was really clean, the shower nice, good light from the windows, friendly staff (we asked for a kettle and we could have it with us in the room the whole time during our stay). The WiFi unfortunately was not the strongest. The mattress was comfortable. The room has a table and chair. And really important, air conditioner and fan.

reviews.title: Great location and  value for the cost
reviews.text:
I had a large room on the 5th floor in front with a small balcony and a wall of windows. A quiet refrigerator and Wi-Fi between 30 and 50 speed but often went off for a minute or more. 

One block from the river with lovely restaurants and walking path and a fantastic view of the biggest building downtown lit up at night, surrounded by small parks across the road, the best supermarket Tops 5 minutes away, and one minute drive on to the bridge to get into district 1 tourist area. During Tet week it was very quiet but when people returned to work there was more traffic noise, especially in the mornings, but not bad. 

My one complaint is that I visited 3 earlier days in person to check out the room and asked for the light bulb to be replaced in the only nice yellow lamp because it has ugly white fluorescent tubes. For the glass to be cleaned which was very dirty and to have an electric kettle. I also emailed the day before to remind them and still none of this was done until I arrived and I had to ask repeatedly and wait and then be disturbed by people coming into my room to do it. The woman on reception during the day is to blame. The cleaning boys also were above me and sat in the hallway playing music and news many hours of the day and it was stopped when I mentioned it to the manager because the bathroom windows cannot be closed and the noise comes right in. Just wear earphones or go into a room and close the door. You can also hear the people across from you thru their bathroom window. It helps to shut the door but I liked the only pleasant yellow ceiling light in there to shine in the room in the evenings. 

Otherwise I really enjoyed my stay and it was an incredibly low price through my Agoda discount.

reviews.title: Valuable to stay
reviews.text: Clean room, cheap price and quite place

reviews.title: Saigon Stay
reviews.text: My entire stay there was quiet with the exception of the last two nights. The people next to my room were sure noisy, banging the door several times today. I really don’t understand the behavior of some people and how inconsiderate they can be with no regards to anyone else. Not only were they noisy but were smoking on the patio next to my room. I know that It not the fault of the hotel but still. Will definitely stay there next time when I’m back to Saigon.

reviews.title: Stay in Saigon
reviews.text: Friendly staff. The lady on days always has a big smile on her face. Place is close to everything. Location is a challenge to walk around and to cross the street is quite an adventure especially for an older person.

reviews.title: A pleasant stay
reviews.text: Staff were easy to communicate with and helpful. Good location with nice places to eat and near the river. Good value for money based on cost.

reviews.title: Stay in saigon
reviews.text: This is my preferred hotel when in Saigon. It’s clean, staff is friendly and helpful. It’s also close to malls and places to eat. Will definitely recommend to anyone

reviews.title: Outstanding value for money
reviews.text: Nothing flashy--though the larger than usual HDTV was a bonus--but doesn't lack any basic essentials. Clean room, soft bed, clean linens (changed whenever requested) nice little balcony. For the price, quite unbeatable. A short walk or Grab from lots of interesting things to do. I'd stay there again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Lots of options for restaurants and dining two minute walk to the Saigon river with cafés all the way along the shore

reviews.title: Perfect place for thao dien
reviews.text: Easy check in. Clean rooms. Cold ac. Perfect location if you want to visit thao dien. Next to the metro station. A bit noisy at night but overall really pleasant

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: Good location if you're visiting friends in D2. Its near the Metro station too, so if you're a tourist, its quite easy to get to BT market.

reviews.title: Budget hotel with enough
reviews.text: Clean, enough facilities for basics

reviews.title: Good for the money
reviews.text: No problems, all good.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: It's my 2nd time to book with them and the service is still good. However, I requested for a non-smoking room and they did give me one BUT my room doesn't have a window and I can smell the cigarette from the other rooms. That's my only complaint. Most of the time the people from the other rooms are smoking so my room smells like cigarette smoke. 😭

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: With the price and such a central location, I am very satisfied. The room is spacious, and the bathroom is clean. However, it is a bit stuffy with the air conditioning.

reviews.title: Location is great
reviews.text: I went with my sister, and we were in the standard room. Room is fine, not something special but worst for money. However, the location is perfect, easy to reach other destination, near subway, water bus station. Also opposite the landmark 81 with the great view.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text:
I stayed here in January 2025 originally for 3 nights but extended it a further 3 nights as it was a nice stay.

Walkable to Thao Đien station and Thao Đien area with lots of restaurants and bars.

Was able to rent a motorcycle for 100,000/24 hours, the place was clean and relatively quiet.

Staff were friendly and I’ll probably stay here again next time I go to HCMC.

reviews.title: Claen, comfortable, and basic
reviews.text: If you just want a place that's clean with all the basic comforts, Saigon River Hotel will suit your needs.   The beds are comfy, the sheets and towels are clean, and they have ceiling fans, AC, wifi, and hot water   That's all it is.  The staff are very friendly and accommodating, too.  Although it's not in the central and more hip part of Thao Dien, it's adjacent to it, which is great in my opinion.

reviews.title: Good for Solo Travel
reviews.text: The room is clean and the bed is nice too. It's a nice place to stay espwcially if you want to focus in Thao Dien. This is good place they are also open 24 hours.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Good for simple place to stay and rest

My room included:
- restroom, shower, soap, towel, tooth brush
- fridge
- fan, A/C, window
- comfy clean bed
- closet

Only wish there was a safe included for security

Wifi was kinda choppy during my stay, but fast when it did work. Might be an issue if you need reliable connection like I do for meetings / calls

reviews.title: Absolutely deserved.
reviews.text: The staff is lovely, and there is a sister who can speak English. I'm in a beautiful room with a landmark view, very clean, with an elevator to the upper floors, a refrigerator, and hot water for bathing, although the water pressure is a bit weak. There's no kettle for cooking noodles, but the price is definitely worth it. This is the best experience I've had on Agoda so far.

Oh, there's a very cute park across the street, everyone should take advantage of the morning to go exercise.

reviews.title: Dơ bẩn , lừa dối khách hàng. Agoda tẩy chay khách sạn này
reviews.text: Làm ăn láo cá , mình đặt phòng trên Agoda , đã thanh toán, đến nơi nhận phòng thì bảo đang dọn phòng, chờ 10 phút ,lúc mình đến là 22h30 tối, chờ hơn 30 phút vẫn chưa dọn dẹp xong , lễ tân bảo nhân viên dọn phòng kỹ, kêu mình chờ thêm 5 phút, 5 phút sau đúng 1 cặp từ phòng ngay chổ mình ngồi chờ đi ra trả phòng, lễ tân kêu đã dọn xong, đúng ngay cặp kia vừa  ra, dơ bẫn đến thế là cùng, mình bỏ đi tìm khách sạn khác, tiền thì trả Agoda rồi, Agoda vẫn cho khách sạn Saigon river hotel này là 1 điều dơ bẩn nhất

reviews.title: Chăm sóc khách hàng không tốt
reviews.text: Mình và người yêu đi đặt phòng và đến nhưng không tìm thấy địa chỉ, gọi cho khách sạn để hỏi đường đến thì 10 cuộc cũng không được, nhờ sự hỗ trợ của cskh agoda cũng không liên lạc được với khách sạn
reviews.response: Khách sạn nghi nhận những ý kiến của quý Khách, Chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc, Chúng tôi sẽ làm việc với bộ phận lễ tân để đảm bảo dịch vụ được tốt hơn.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Lần đầu ghé cũng như lần cuối TỆ QUÁ TỆ, phòng giường chăn thì dơ nhân viên thì không nhiệt tình tuyển chi mấy thằng trẻ nó làm biếng chít moẹ, hỏi tới thì nói chuyện cộc lốc chúng tôi ở trả tiền chứ k có ở free mà thái độ phục vụ kiểu đó ai muốn book chỗ này thì nên suy nghĩ lại né GẤP dùm e😑

reviews.title: Tính tiền nước uống
reviews.text:
Nước uống không bao gồm, bán 10k/chai, nhân viên nói chuyện vô lễ, yêu cầu gặp quản lý thì gằn giọng thách thức. Yêu cầu cung cấp nước uống thì miễn cưỡng.
Phòng nhỏ, ga không sạch, tóc còn vương đầy sàn.
